author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Overwatch - Season 3: Into the Tiger’s Den Trailer | PS5 Games
https://www.playstation.com/games/overwatch/

Are you ready to step Into the Tiger’s Den?

A new chapter in the Reign of Talon starts here with the arrival of our newest Damage Hero, Shion. As the Hashimoto Clan’s most terrifying elder, Shion brings a dangerous new arsenal to the battlefield with her dual semi-auto pistols and a motorcycle she can crash into her enemies.

Battle through the streets of Tokyo in the all-new Hybrid Map, Neon Junction, filled with nods to Japanese culture and easter eggs around every corner. Tokyo also comes to life in our new Anima Strike Meta Event where you earn new rewards based on which path you choose to go down.

That’s not all though! Unlock brand new cosmetics through the Season 3 Battle Pass and in the Shop like Illari’s Ascendant Phoenix Mythic Hero Skin, Hanzo’s Tokyo Rebel Mythic Weapon Skin, new Ultra Skins with added VFX, new skins as part of our upcoming YOASOBI collaboration, and much more.

Experience all that Season 3: Into the Tiger’s Den has to offer when it arrives in-game TOMORROW.

#ps5 #ps5games #overwatch

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Assassin's Creed Shadows - Final Update | PS5 Games
Assassin's Creed Shadows' final Title Update is coming! 

This content drop wraps up Yasuke and Naoe’s story with the Black Tides quest, introduces the high-challenge Domains feature for the most dedicated Assassins, and adds two new Animus Live Projects bridging Feudal Japan and the Caribbean.

About Assassin's Creed Shadows:

In Assassin’s Creed Shadows, you will live the intertwined stories of Naoe, an adept shinobi Assassin from Iga Province, and Yasuke, the powerful African samurai of historical legend. Against the backdrop of the turbulent late Sengoku period, this remarkable duo will discover their common destiny as they usher in a new era for Japan.

From chaos to purpose, from darkness to light. A new Creed rises over Japan.

© Ubisoft Entertainment. All Rights Reserved.
Assassin’s Creed, Ubisoft, and the Ubisoft logo are registered or unregistered trademarks of Ubisoft Entertainment in the U.S. and/or other countries.

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Frostpunk 2 Breach of Trust - New Scenario Trailer | PS5 Games
"I had a dream..." 
But dreams die. Albeit not in freeze this time, but in fire. 

As New Edinburgh faces eruption and collapse, the Old Captain's reign ends. Now it falls to you - the First Citizen - to choose between salvation and survival. Trust or force. Unity or treachery.

Breach of Trust DLC, a new sceanrio for Frostpunk 2, arrives June 23rd.

#ps5 #ps5games

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
BrokenLore : Don't Lie - Release Date Trailer | PS5 Games
Launching September 10th on PlayStation®5

BrokenLore: DON'T LIE is a Japanese psychological horror game exploring trauma, isolation, and a fractured reality where perception becomes increasingly unreliable. 

Step into the life of Junko, a hikikomori whose carefully controlled world begins to unravel as the past resurfaces in ways she can no longer ignore.

#ps5 #ps5games

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Mistfall Hunter - New Class: Withered Knight Trailer | PS5 Games
Mistfall Hunter is a dark fantasy extraction ARPG set in Weavereach, a shattered world where the gods have perished and the Gyldenmist sweeps the realm. As a new playable class, the Withered Knight stides into the Gyldenmist with a two-handed greatsword and a chivalric code that won't quit. Once the Rose Knights of the Kingdom of Gaenaria: sworn, ceremonial, gilded. Now they are exiles, now they cast to the North and branded “Withered Knights.”

Coming to PlayStation 5 on July 29, 2026. Dive into the free Open Beta demo starting June 14 at 6 PM PT.

#ps5 #ps5games
